zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强但动能分化
zh.content:
当前BTC整体呈震荡偏强结构，价格运行在20日均线上方，但上方抛压仍存，短线缺乏明确突破动能，市场进入高位整理阶段，波动逐步收敛。

技术指标方面，MACD仍处于零轴下方且柱状收缩，说明空头动能减弱但尚未转强；均线系统保持上行结构，短期趋势更多体现为震荡修复。

支撑与阻力来看，下方支撑集中在65400附近与65600低点区域；上方关键压力在66380一线，若有效放量突破，有机会进一步冲击67000整数关口。

交易策略上建议以区间思路应对，未突破前不宜追高；回踩20日均线附近可分批关注多单机会，若跌破65400则需及时控制风险并观望。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin is currently trading in a consolidation phase around 65,952, showing a mild upward bias after a small 24-hour gain of 0.39%. Price action remains range-bound between recent intraday lows near 65,661 and highs around 66,384. The broader structure suggests short-term stabilization following prior volatility, with buyers gradually defending lower levels while upside momentum remains limited by nearby resistance zones. Market participants remain cautious awaiting a clear breakout direction signal.

Technical indicators present a mixed but slightly cautious outlook. The MACD reading at -137.15 indicates lingering bearish momentum, though the magnitude suggests potential weakening of downside pressure. With RSI unavailable, momentum confirmation is limited, so price behavior around moving averages becomes more important. The 20-day SMA at 65,442 acts as a key dynamic support, currently holding price structure intact level. Short-term sentiment remains neutral as traders await confirmation signals emerge.

Immediate support is located near 65,600, aligning closely with recent swing lows and the lower boundary of the current range. Below this, the 65,400 area tied to the 20-day SMA provides stronger structural support. On the upside, resistance is seen at 66,384, followed by a psychological barrier near 67,000, where sellers may re-emerge and cap further advances in the near term. Volume confirmation will be key for breakout validation signals.

Trading conditions favor a range-bound strategy while price remains between support and resistance levels. Traders may consider accumulating near support zones with tight risk controls, while taking partial profits into resistance areas. A breakout above 66,400 could signal renewed bullish momentum toward 67,000, whereas a breakdown below 65,400 would increase downside risk and shift bias back to bearish continuation mode. Risk management remains essential in volatile conditions across timeframes now.
